title: Context continuity protocol
manual_review: Merge the short context checkpoint rules into AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and .codex/rules.md without replacing local rules.
Review workflow-router, bounded-auto, document responsibility, codebase map, and handoff updates before adopting them.
non_goals: No token monitor, hook, runner, daemon, or scheduler
No full chat or long tool output writeback
No automatic business docs or confirmed requirements changes
